relaxed-review-status-check.description: Review skill accepts sets in both 'complete' and 'executed' status

state-transition-self-loop.description: Self-transition from executed to executed is allowed for idempotency

merge-artifact-cleanup.description: Before merging, untracked planning artifacts on main are handled to prevent merge failures

bug-fix-skill.description: New /rapid:bug-fix skill that reads review artifacts and dispatches rapid-bugfix agent

bug-fix-artifact-reader.signature: readReviewArtifacts(projectRoot, setId, postMerge?): { bugs, unitFailures, uatIssues }
bug-fix-artifact-reader.description: Library function to read and parse all review artifacts for a set

executed-accepted-in-review.description: Review skill accepts sets with status 'executed' in addition to 'complete'

merge-idempotent-with-artifacts.description: Running /rapid:merge with planning artifacts on main succeeds without user intervention

bug-fix-reads-review-artifacts.description: Bug-fix skill reads from standard or post-merge path and presents findings before dispatching fixes

bug-fix-updates-state.description: After applying fixes, bug-fix skill updates REVIEW-ISSUES.json to mark findings as fixed
